chunks.text: Page 1 of 2 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Jail Appeal No.S-134 of 2018. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of main case. 18.03.2026. Ms. Ambreen Siyal, Advocate for Appellant. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant Prosecutor General for the State alongwith ASP Shakeel Baig from Central Prison, Hyderabad. ***************************************** Assistant Superintendent Central Prison & Correctional Facility Hyderabad present on behalf of the Jail Superintendent, Central Prison, Hyderabad, submits that the appellants, namely Chettan and Rajoo, are presently confined solely on account of non-payment of Arsh and Daman. However, he informs that this criminal jail appeal to the extent of appellant Rajoo has already been disposed of by this Court vide order dated 01.03.2024 whereby the appellant was directed to deposit the amount of Diyat, Arsh and Daman in easy installments. In view of such situation the report has been called from Accountant of this Court to calculate the amount of Arsh and Daman regarding appellant Chettan; consequently, he furnished the report dated 18.03.2026 in terms of order dated 02.02.2024 passed by this Court; the report reflects that the total share amount in respect of Arsh and Daman for appellant Chettan is Rs.1,202,896/- (Twelve Lac Two Thousand Eight Hundred and Ninety Six). Assistant Superintendent Central Prison & Correctional Facility Hyderabad further submits that Qarshi Foundation Islamabad is voluntarily inclined to deposit said amount in the Office of Accountant of this Court through its Additional Registrar and on payment of such amount, the appellant Chettan is not intended to pursue the instant jail appeal on merits.

In view of such situation the report has been called from Accountant of this Court to calculate the amount of Arsh and Daman regarding appellant Chettan; consequently, he furnished the report dated 18.03.2026 in terms of order dated 02.02.2024 passed by this Court; the report reflects that the total share amount in respect of Arsh and Daman for appellant Chettan is Rs.1,202,896/- (Twelve Lac Two Thousand Eight Hundred and Ninety Six). Assistant Superintendent Central Prison & Correctional Facility Hyderabad further submits that Qarshi Foundation Islamabad is voluntarily inclined to deposit said amount in the Office of Accountant of this Court through its Additional Registrar and on payment of such amount, the appellant Chettan is not intended to pursue the instant jail appeal on merits. Mr. Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh extends his no objection to the above proposal. Page 2 of 2 In view of above facts, the Qarshi Foundation Islamabad is allowed to deposit the aforementioned Arsh and Daman amount awarded against appellant Chettan in terms of the impugned judgment as calculated by the Accountant of this Court. Once the said amount is deposited by the Qarshi Foundation Islamabad before Accountant of this Court, the appellant Chettan shall be released forthwith if he is not required in any other custody/case in view of jail role dated 24.12.2025, as he has already served out his entire sentence awarded to him by the learned Trial Court. It is clarified that Qarshi Foundation Islamabad has deposited the amount which is more than the share amount of appellant Chettan as calculated by the Accountant of this Court, as such, it is directed that after receipt of full payment in respect of appellant Chettan, the remaining amount will be deposited with regard to easy installment for appellant Rajoo in view of vide order dated 01.03.2024. Instant Jail Appeal to the extent of appellant Chettan also is disposed of in the above terms. Before parting with this order, the efforts taken by the Qarshi Foundation Islamabad and Superintendent Central Prison Hyderabad are highly commendable and appreciated. Let copy of this order be communicated to I.G Prisons Sindh Karachi and Jail Superintendent Hyderabad. JUDGE Ali.
